mapper.select: select a.title as title, a.addr1 as addr1, a.addr2 as addr2, a.content_type_id as contentTypeId from attraction_saves as2 join attractions a on a.id = as2.attraction_id where as2.member_id = #{memberId} and a.status = 'ACTIVE' and a.deleted_at is null order by as2.created_at desc

select n.title as title, n.category as category, string_agg(t.name, ',') as tagNames from note_saves ns join notes n on n.id = ns.note_id left join note_tags nt on nt.note_id = n.id left join tags t on t.id = nt.tag_id where ns.member_id = #{memberId} and n.status = 'ACTIVE' and n.deleted_at is null group by n.id, n.title, n.category, ns.created_at order by ns.created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into member_profile_embeddings ( member_id, profile_description, embedding, source_version, source_hash, embedding_dimension, provider, model, status, failure_code, failure_message, attempt_count, last_attempted_at, embedded_at, updated_at ) values ( #{memberId}, #{profileDescription}, #{vectorLiteral}::vector, #{sourceVersion}, #{sourceHash}, #{dimension}, #{provider}, #{model}, 'EMBEDDED', null, null, 1, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, current_timestamp ) on conflict (member_id) do update set profile_description = excluded.profile_description, embedding = excluded.embedding, source_version = excluded.source_version, source_hash = excluded.source_hash, embedding_dimension = excluded.embedding_dimension, provider = excluded.provider, model = excluded.model, status = 'EMBEDDED', failure_code = null, failure_message = null, attempt_count = member_profile_embeddings.attempt_count + 1, last_attempted_at = current_timestamp, embedded_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp

insert into member_profile_embeddings ( member_id, source_version, source_hash, embedding_dimension, provider, model, status, failure_code, failure_message, attempt_count, last_attempted_at, updated_at ) values ( #{memberId}, #{sourceVersion}, #{sourceHash}, 1536, #{provider}, #{model}, 'FAILED', #{failureCode}, #{failureMessage}, 1, current_timestamp, current_timestamp ) on conflict (member_id) do update set source_version = excluded.source_version, source_hash = excluded.source_hash, embedding_dimension = 1536, provider = excluded.provider, model = excluded.model, status = 'FAILED', embedding = null, failure_code = excluded.failure_code, failure_message = excluded.failure_message, attempt_count = member_profile_embeddings.attempt_count + 1, last_attempted_at = current_timestamp, embedded_at = null, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.select: select source_hash from member_profile_embeddings where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 'EMBEDDED'
select profile_description from member_profile_embeddings where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 'EMBEDDED' and profile_description is not null
select exists( select 1 from member_profile_embeddings where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 'EMBEDDED' and embedding is not null )
